name: Chan Pilates
addressFull: 88/259 Beach Road, Bang Saray, Sattahip, Chon Buri 20250
hours: Open daily; Google Maps currently shows closing at 20:00

equipment.airConditioningNotes: A recent Thai first-timer explicitly praises the strong air conditioning.

praise: Thai beginners praise clear instruction, a clean new studio, good music and cool air conditioning.
Reviewers describe a friendly community and sufficient parking.

sources.label: Google Maps Chan Pilates listing and Thai reviews
Operator Facebook linked by Google
sources.accessNote: Identity link only; no price was captured.

confidenceReason: Only two publishers; all membership/class prices and contract terms are missing despite hours and air conditioning being established.
identityNote: CHAN STUDIO and Chan Pilates are duplicate pins about 8 metres apart at the same 88/259 site. They are merged as one venue record.
